metadata.description: All-in-one agent harness for Claude Code — 56 core agents always loaded + 136 domain agent-packs on demand, 213 skills, 77 rules, 7 hooks, 3 MCP servers. Bundles agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, gstack, and superpowers with weekly CI auto-sync.

plugins.name: my-claude
plugins.description: 56 core agents always loaded + 136 domain agent-packs on demand (Boss orchestrator, Hephaestus autonomous worker, agency specialists, OMC agents, 1 Superpowers agent), 213 skills (including 14 Superpowers skills), 77 rules, behavioral correction hooks, and MCP servers (Context7, Exa, grep.app)
